```python
import openpyxl
from openpyxl.chart import BarChart, Reference
import argparse

def create_chart(sheet, data_range, title):
    chart = BarChart()
    chart.title = title
    chart.add_data(data_range, titles_from_data=True)
    sheet.add_chart(chart, "E5")
    # Set the font for the chart
    for text in chart.series:
        text.dLbls.font.name = "Credit Suisse Type Light"
    return chart

def generate_report(country):
    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook('input_file.xlsx')
    sheet = wb.active
    
    data_range = Reference(sheet, min_col=1, min_row=1, max_col=3, max_row=10)
    create_chart(sheet, data_range, f"{country} Monthly Report")
    
    wb.save(f"{country}_report.xlsx")

def solve(*args):
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Generate a monthly report.')
    parser.add_argument('-c', '--country', required=True, help='Country name')
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    generate_report(args.country)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
```
